reason_for_decision: The article passes because it draws clear boundaries between detection, classification, and identification, then ties those boundaries to evidence burden and operator workflow.
strengths: The article keeps the three surveillance outcomes distinct and operationally meaningful from start to finish.
It explains how evidence burden changes across the ladder instead of treating the terms as vocabulary only.
The procurement and operator-clarity sections make the distinction useful in real system design.
summary_assessment: This article is a strong pass under the strict rubric. It is clear, disciplined, and especially useful for correcting terminology drift in surveillance discussions.
